entry.title: New: BILL051(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO ADAPTIVE REUSE.

Adds lighting and ventilation standards with respect to the adaptive reuse of commercial buildings. Provides for an effective date of January 1, 2025; provided that: (a) the ordinance does not affect any building permits that had been issued prior to the effective date of this ordinance; and (b) all building permit applications received prior to the effective date of the ordinance and deemed complete for processing by the Department of Planning and Permitting must be processed in accordance with Section 1 6A-4.4, Revised Ordinances of Honolulu 2021, in the form in which it read prior to the effective date of the ordinance.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
